'''Dropkick''' was a [[Stormtrooper/Legends|stormtrooper]] of [[Unit Aurek-Three]] of [[Aurek Company]] in the [[501st Legion/Legends|501st Legion]] of the [[Empire of the Hand]].

Dropkick participated in the final [[Capture of the Warlord|assault]] against "[[the Warlord]]" on [[Kariek]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Fool's Bargain]]'' {{1st}}
